--- 
title: "Data Analysis for Psychology in R 2"
author: "Department of Psychology, The University of Edinburgh"
date: "Academic year 2020-2021"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [references.bib, packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
description: "DAPR2 is a 2nd year course in data analysis for psychological research."
---


```{r book-setup, include=FALSE}
source("dropdowns.R")	


# automatically create a bib database for R packages
knitr::write_bib(c(
  .packages(), 'bookdown', 'knitr', 'rmarkdown'
), 'packages.bib')


knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    message = FALSE, 
    warning = FALSE, 
    fig.align = 'center',
    out.width = '60%'
)
```



# Welcome {-}

Data Analysis for Psychology in R 2 (DAPR2) is a 2nd year course in data analysis for psychological research, using the R software. 

This course will introduce you to statistical modelling beyond what is typically taught in an introductory statistics course, empowering you with tools to analyse richer data and answer a broader set of research questions of interest to you.


<!-- ## Course team {-} -->

<!-- - [Dr Tom Booth](https://www.ed.ac.uk/profile/tom-booth) / [email me!](mailto:Tom.Booth@ed.ac.uk) -->
<!-- - [Dr Alex Doumas](https://www.ed.ac.uk/profile/leonidas-doumas) / [email me!](mailto:Alex.Doumas@ed.ac.uk) -->
<!-- - [Dr Josiah King](https://www.ed.ac.uk/profile/josiah-pj-king) / [email me!](mailto:ug.ppls.stats@ed.ac.uk?subject=DAPR2 - ) -->
<!-- - [Dr Umberto Noe](https://www.ed.ac.uk/profile/umberto-noe) / [email me!](mailto:ug.ppls.stats@ed.ac.uk?subject=DAPR2 - ) -->
